chunks.text:
TABLE: promotions

DESCRIPTION: Promotional campaigns and discount codes.

NATURAL_LANGUAGE_TERMS: promotions, discounts, promo codes, coupon codes, offers, deals, campaigns

PRIMARY_KEY: promotion_id

FOREIGN_KEYS: none

COLUMNS: promotion_id, promotion_name, promotion_type, discount_percent, discount_amount, start_date, end_date, promo_code, min_purchase_amount, max_discount, status, usage_limit, times_used

USE_CASES: Active promotions, discount analysis, promo code lookup, campaign performance

metadata.text:
TABLE: promotions

USE_CASES: Active promotions, discount analysis, promo code lookup, campaign performance
